name: picoclaw-security-guardian
description: Picoclaw security posture skill with advisory awareness, configuration drift detection, and supply-chain verification guidance.
author: prompt-security

files.description: Skill documentation and Picoclaw operator playbook
Picoclaw posture profile and path-confinement helpers
Baseline comparison and severity mapping helpers
Generate deterministic Picoclaw security posture profile
Compare Picoclaw profile against an approved baseline
Verify release artifact checksums and required detached signatures for provenance
Check Picoclaw-relevant advisories from a signed/verified feed state

execution.persistence: Read-only/on-demand in v0.0.1; no scheduler is installed.
execution.network_egress: None by default. Advisory checks consume local verified feed state/cache unless the operator supplies a feed file.

operator_review: Picoclaw-specific skill: use for Picoclaw gateways and lightweight AI gateway deployments, not OpenClaw hook execution.
Treat public Web UI binding and broad chat-channel enablement as review findings until explicitly justified.
Keep unsigned advisory mode temporary and documented; default workflows expect verified feed state.
Supply-chain verification requires manifests/signatures from a trusted release source; third-party LuCI wrappers need separate provenance review.
